request.prompt: Créez le produit "Service réseau" avec le numéro de produit 2003. Le prix est de 28300 NOK hors TVA, avec le taux standard de 25 %.

content.text:
Today's date: 2026-03-19

Créez le produit "Service réseau" avec le numéro de produit 2003. Le prix est de 28300 NOK hors TVA, avec le taux standard de 25 %.
Je vais créer le produit "Service réseau" avec les spécifications demandées. D'abord, je vais vérifier la documentation de l'API et récupérer le type de TVA approprié.

content.content:
{"method":"POST","path":"/product","category":"product","summary":"Create new product.","documentation":"#### `POST /product`

**Summary:** Create new product.

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `Product`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperProduct`
"}

{"name":"Product","documentation":"### `Product`

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `account` | Account |  |  |
| `availableStock` | number |  | Available only on demand (read-only) |
| `changes` | Array<Change> |  |  (read-only) |
| `costExcludingVatCurrency` | number |  | Price purchase (cost) excluding VAT in the product's currency |
| `costPrice` | number |  | Cost price of purchase (read-only) |
| `currency` | Currency |  |  |
| `department` | Department |  |  |
| `description` | string |  |  |
| `discountGroup` | DiscountGroup |  |  |
| `discountPrice` | number |  |  (read-only) |
| `displayName` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `displayNumber` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `ean` | string |  |  |
| `elNumber` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `expenses` | number |  |  |
| `expensesInPercent` | number |  |  (read-only) |
| `hasSupplierProductConnected` | boolean |  |  |
| `hsnCode` | string |  |  |
| `id` | integer |  |  |
| `image` | Document |  |  |
| `incomingStock` | number |  | Available only on demand (read-only) |
| `isDeletable` | boolean |  | For performance reasons, field is deprecated and it will always return false. |
| `isInactive` | boolean |  |  |
| `isRoundPriceIncVat` | boolean |  | [BETA] Indicates whether the price incl. VAT is rounded off or not (read-only) |
| `isStockItem` | boolean |  |  |
| `mainSupplierProduct` | SupplierProduct |  |  |
| `markupListPercentage` | number |  |  (read-only) |
| `markupNetPercentage` | number |  |  (read-only) |
| `minStockLevel` | number |  | Minimum available stock level for the product. Applicable only to stock items in the Logistics Basic |
| `name` | string |  |  |
| `nrfNumber` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `number` | string |  |  |
| `orderLineDescription` | string |  |  |
| `outgoingStock` | number |  | Available only on demand (read-only) |
| `priceExcludingVatCurrency` | number |  | Price of purchase excluding VAT in the product's currency |
| `priceInTargetCurrency` | number |  | Purchase Price converted in specific currency. (read-only) |
| `priceIncludingVatCurrency` | number |  | Price of purchase including VAT in the product's currency |
| `productUnit` | ProductUnit |  |  |
| `profit` | number |  |  (read-only) |
| `profitInPercent` | number |  |  (read-only) |
| `purchasePriceCurrency` | number |  | Purchase Price in product currency. This affects only Supplier Products. (read-only) |
| `resaleProduct` | Product |  |  |
| `stockOfGoods` | number |  | Available only on demand (read-only) |
| `supplier` | Supplier |  |  |
| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `vatType` | VatType |  |  |
| `version` | integer |  |  |
| `volume` | number |  |  |
| `volumeUnit` | string enum: ['cm3', 'dm3', 'm3'] |  |  |
| `weight` | number |  |  |
| `weightUnit` | string enum: ['kg', 'g', 'hg'] |  |  |
"}

content.text: Maintenant, je vais récupérer les types de TVA pour trouver celui à 25% (sortant).

content.text:
Parfait ! J'ai trouvé le type de TVA à 25% avec l'ID 3. Maintenant je vais créer le produit avec :
- Prix hors TVA : 28300 NOK
- Prix TTC : 28300 × 1.25 = 35375 NOK
